title: Fur & Bone 3.8L Silica Cat Litter - Non-Clumping Cat Litter Crystals - Ultra Absorbent, Fast-Drying & Low-Dust, Odor Control Crystal Granules, Easy to Clean for Housetraining Cats and Kittens
features: SUPERIOR ABSORPTION & COMFORT FOR CATS AND KITTENS: Our Fur & Bone silica cat litter crystals deliver exceptional absorbency, locking in moisture instantly to keep your cat’s litter tray fresh and dry. Perfect for use as non-clumping cat litter, the gentle texture is comfortable for delicate kitten paws and adult cats alike. This premium kitty litter reduces tracking around your home and is ideal for litter & housetraining for cats. Whether you’re filling a cat litter bin or using a smaller tray, these ultra-absorbent silica granules ensure lasting dryness for maximum comfort.

ADVANCED ODOUR CONTROL & LOW DUST FORMULA: Say goodbye to unpleasant smells with our crystal kitty litter designed for long-lasting odor control. The highly porous silica traps urine and ammonia odors, keeping your cat litter area smelling fresh for weeks. Perfect for households with multiple cats, this non-clumping cat litter is low in dust to protect respiratory health, making it suitable for kittens and sensitive cats. Use it in a cat litter bin or open tray for optimal freshness. The fast-drying properties mean less mess, less tracking, and a cleaner environment for you and your pets.

EASY CLEANING & LOW MAINTENANCE DESIGN: Simplify your cat care routine with our non-clumping cat litter that’s easy to clean and maintain. Silica cat litter crystals absorb liquid quickly, leaving solids on the surface for easy removal. No heavy clumping means less scraping and more convenience, making it perfect for busy cat owners. This lightweight, low-dust kitty litter is compatible with most cat litter bins and trays, offering hassle-free litter & housetraining for cats. Just top up as needed, and enjoy a fresher, cleaner litter box with minimal effort.

LONG-LASTING & COST-EFFECTIVE: Our premium silica cat litter bag is designed to last longer than traditional clumping clay litters, saving you time and money. Each granule absorbs multiple times its weight in liquid, keeping the cat litter tray drier for extended periods. Ideal for multi-cat households or single cats, this non-clumping cat litter is perfect for litter & housetraining for cats of all ages. Its ultra-absorbent nature means fewer full litter changes, making it a cost-effective choice for keeping your kitty litter area clean and fresh.

SAFE, GENTLE & SUITABLE FOR ALL CATS: Made from high-quality, non-toxic silica, our Fur & Bone non-clumping cat litter is safe for kittens, adult cats, and senior felines. The smooth crystal texture is gentle on paws, encouraging your pet to use the litter tray consistently. Whether used in a cat litter bin, open box, or self-cleaning litter system, it offers superior comfort and hygiene. Perfect for litter & housetraining for cats, this low-dust kitty litter keeps your home fresher and cleaner while supporting your cat’s health and happiness.
